欢迎来到“易起读”公益阅读平台: Welcome to the "Yiqidu" public welfare reading platform
对热心的志愿者团队：: To our dedicated team of volunteers:
yqd-intro: "Yiqidu" is a social innovation project led by the Shanghai Songding Social Innovation and Development Center (SSIC), dedicated to connecting communities through reading, and promoting cultural sharing and lifelong learning.
yqd-readers: This is an open and inclusive reading community. Whether you are looking for high-quality reading materials or hoping to share insights with like-minded book lovers, Yiqidu can provide you with rich resources and a platform.
yqd-volunteers: Every contribution you make transmits the warmth of knowledge. Join us to co-plan book sharing sessions, assist in community library operations, and let the power of reading reach more corners.
yqd-mentors: We look forward to your professional guidance. Here, you can offer guided reading courses, accompany the growth of young people, and ignite their inner spark for knowledge.
yqd-donors: Your support is the cornerstone of the project's sustainable development. Every donation will be managed transparently and directly translated into book resources and improved reading environments for the beneficiary groups.
yqd-outro: On this platform, we look forward to every participant finding their place and jointly building a "connected, symbiotic, and sustainably innovative" learning community. This system provides comprehensive AI digital platform support for the Yiqidu project.
